description_long: This object is a classic revolver-style firearm with a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust, dark metallic frame. The barrel is elongated and features a simple, unadorned design with a small front sight. The grip is made of wood, showing a natural brown color and a smooth, ergonomic curve for comfortable handling. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, while the hammer is visible at the rear of the frame. The cylinder, characteristic of revolvers, is prominent and appears to hold multiple rounds. The overall finish is matte with some subtle wear, giving it a utilitarian and rugged appearance.
description: A classic revolver-style firearm with a long, dark metal barrel and a smooth wooden grip. The design is robust and utilitarian, featuring a prominent cylinder and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip, and the prominent cylinder.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel with the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the barrel, grip, and cylinder, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the hammer, with the cylinder partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves
